name: Beckwith Buses
fmcsa_address: 92 BELL HOLLOW LN, PORT MATILDA, PA 16870
registry_source: Pennsylvania Department of State business entity search not directly accessible via WebFetch (403); third-party D&B/Buzzfile-type sources indicate PA incorporation in 1998
notes: FMCSA SAFER carrier snapshot matched exactly on name + address (92 Bell Hollow Ln, Port Matilda, PA 16870). Carrier operates 9 power units + 9 non-CMV units, 2 drivers, intrastate only (non-hazmat), private passenger (non-business), cargo: passengers / school students. Zero inspections, zero crashes in past 24 months. No formal safety rating assigned. No MC number listed (consistent with intrastate-only private passenger operation). PA DOS entity search (file.dos.pa.gov) blocks WebFetch (403); incorporation year of 1998 is from third-party business directory rather than the official PA registry, so inc_date should be confirmed manually.

name: Spiker Bus Lines Inc
registry_source: Pennsylvania Department of State business entity search (file.dos.pa.gov) not directly accessible via WebFetch (403); third-party sources (Buzzfile, Manta, D&B, Yellow Pages) consistently identify the entity as Franklin Spiker Buslines / Spiker Bus Lines Inc at 848 Gibbon Glade Rd, Gibbon Glade, PA 15440, woman-owned, PA-incorporated 1973, ~12 employees
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record found - direct keyword search for 'SPIKER' and 'SPIKER BUS LINES' and 'FRANKLIN SPIKER' in the SAFER keyword search returned zero matches. Likely operates as a small intrastate school bus contractor under PA PUC authority (school bus carriers in PA can operate without a USDOT number if intrastate, small fleet, and under certain weight thresholds, particularly when transporting students under school district contract). Owner identified as Charlene Spiker via third-party business directories; phone (724) 329-4616. PA DOS registry not directly accessible via WebFetch.

name: Best Choice Bus Trading Inc
officers: Fernanda F. Silva (VP), Edson L. Silva (VP)
registry_source: Florida Division of Corporations (Sunbiz) - Document Number P12000006414, entity name 'BEST CHOICE BUSINESS TRADING INC' (name as filed). FEI/EIN 45-4305839. Principal address 9710 Alaska Circle, Boca Raton, FL 33434 matches input. Voluntarily dissolved 01/19/2017.
notes: No FMCSA SAFER carrier record found for 'BEST CHOICE BUS TRADING' under that name - SAFER keyword search returned zero matches. Sunbiz registry shows the entity is recorded as 'BEST CHOICE BUSINESS TRADING INC' (not 'Bus Trading') with the exact principal address 9710 Alaska Cir, Boca Raton, FL 33434 - strongly suggests the input list mis-transcribed 'Business' as 'Bus' from the entity name (the address match is exact and the principals are listed at the 9710 Alaska Cir address). Entity was INACTIVE/voluntarily dissolved as of 01/19/2017, so this is almost certainly not an operating school-bus / student-transportation company and is unlikely to be a viable tuck-in target. Original filing 01/19/2012, effective 01/18/2012. Officers Fernanda F. Silva and Edson L. Silva both VPs.

name: North Branch Bus Co
carrier_operation: Authorized for Property (per third-party FMCSA mirror); historically intrastate school bus operator per Bowler School District transportation page
fmcsa_address: 517 W Main Street, Bowler, WI 54416 (per third-party FMCSA mirror; input address shows 507 W Main St - both reference the same downtown Bowler block)
inc_date: 1999-10-17 (per third-party FMCSA mirror citing initial USDOT registration date)
registry_source: Wisconsin DFI Corporate Records Search (apps.dfi.wi.gov/apps/corpsearch) returned no records for 'North Branch Bus' - entity may have been organized before 1977, may be a sole proprietorship / DBA rather than a corporation, or may use a slightly different legal name
notes: FMCSA SAFER direct lookup at USDOT 833590 returned 'inactive' status - the carrier's USDOT number is no longer active in SAFER. Third-party FMCSA mirror (loadconnect.io) provides historical data: USDOT 833590, 14 drivers, 0 power units currently reported, registered 1999-10-17, address 517 W Main Street, Bowler, WI 54416 (input list shows 507 W Main St - small discrepancy, both reference the same downtown Bowler block; could be a transcription difference or relocation). Bowler School District transportation page confirms the company has historically provided student transportation to Bowler-area schools. Status is best characterized as 'inactive USDOT' - operator may still operate intrastate without an active USDOT (WI allows certain school bus contractors to operate under WI DOT authority without an active interstate USDOT). Tuck-in viability uncertain given inactive USDOT.

notes: FMCSA SAFER carrier snapshot matched exactly on name and address (3339 Fehr Rd, Eau Claire, WI 54701). Substantial operator: 122 power units / 125 drivers, MC-998775, interstate / authorized for-hire passenger operation. Safety rating: CONDITIONAL as of 2024-08-26 from compliance review dated 2024-07-10 - this is a meaningful diligence flag for a tuck-in evaluation. Company founded 1939, fourth-generation family-run, serves Altoona, Fall Creek, and Eau Claire school districts. Note: company website / third-party article references '~500 buses' across the broader Student Transit family of companies; the 122 power units in SAFER represents the Eau Claire entity specifically. Wisconsin DFI registration date could not be confirmed via WebFetch on the simple search - manual lookup recommended for the formal inc date.
